name: performance.mixed_hostile_stalker_horde_mcw
description: Mixed hostile performance packet for CAOL-MIXED-HOSTILE-PERF-v0. The fixture pre-stages one active bandit site, one active cannibal site, one writhing stalker, and one overmap horde near the player, then measures a 500-turn sampled local window and a bounded 30-minute wait window. This is a metrics/readability probe for already-promoted hostile systems, not a natural dispatch or horde-attraction proof.

steps.label: post_load_mixed_hostile_perf_fixture_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for the mixed hostile performance fixture; startup/load plus fixture footing only

steps.label: preflight_mixed_perf_bandit_active_job
steps.abort_reason: preflight saved bandit_live_world site did not contain the active bandit stalk job needed before the mixed hostile performance window
steps.expected_immediate_state: saved bandit_live_world contains one active bandit stalk job with live/findable active members before measurement starts

steps.label: preflight_mixed_perf_cannibal_active_job
steps.abort_reason: preflight saved bandit_live_world site did not contain the active cannibal stalk job needed before the mixed hostile performance window
steps.expected_immediate_state: saved bandit_live_world contains one active cannibal stalk job with live/findable active members before measurement starts

steps.label: preflight_mixed_perf_writhing_stalker
steps.abort_reason: preflight saved active_monsters did not contain the single staged mon_writhing_stalker needed for mixed hostile performance
steps.expected_immediate_state: saved active_monsters contains one staged mon_writhing_stalker at a known nearby but non-adjacent offset

steps.label: preflight_mixed_perf_horde
steps.abort_reason: preflight saved overmap horde metadata did not contain the staged zombie horde needed for mixed hostile performance
steps.expected_immediate_state: saved overmap horde_map contains one nearby zombie horde with destination/tracking metadata before measurement starts

steps.label: preflight_mixed_perf_game_turn_baseline
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player turn baseline is recorded before the sampled and wait measurement windows

steps.label: toggle_safe_mode_off_before_mixed_perf_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: safe mode is toggled off before the sampled local-turn performance window

steps.label: measure_500_turns_mixed_hostile_sample
steps.expected_visible_fact: 500 individual turn advances run on the preflight-proven mixed hostile fixture; the step timing records sampled local per-turn wall-clock cost

steps.label: audit_mixed_perf_sample_stalker_artifact
steps.abort_reason: same-run 500-turn sample did not contain writhing-stalker live target/probe instrumentation
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run debug artifact proves the staged writhing stalker reached its live target/probe or live-plan instrumentation during the sampled window

steps.label: measure_30_minutes_mixed_hostile_cadence
steps.pre_menu_expected_visible_fact: alarm/wait mode menu is visible, then Wait a while is chosen before the duration menu for the mixed hostile cadence window
steps.expected_visible_fact: the player waited through a bounded 30-minute hostile overmap cadence window after preflight established one active bandit site, one active cannibal site, one writhing stalker, and one horde
steps.failure_rule: If the wait is interrupted or the artifact delta lacks two-active-site perf/cadence lines, the performance row is yellow/red rather than green.

steps.label: audit_mixed_perf_cadence_artifact
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not contain compact mixed hostile two-site perf counters after the 30-minute wait
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run debug artifact proves the hostile overmap cadence emitted compact perf counters for one bandit active job and one cannibal active job

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_before_mixed_perf_save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime baseline is recorded after the mixed hostile measurement windows and before save/writeback

steps.label: open_save_prompt_after_mixed_perf_windows
steps.abort_reason: screen text did not prove the case-sensitive Save and quit prompt before confirming the mixed hostile performance save
steps.expected_visible_fact: the case-sensitive Save and quit prompt is open after the mixed hostile measurement windows

steps.label: confirm_save_after_mixed_perf_windows
steps.expected_visible_fact: the proven case-sensitive save prompt is confirmed with uppercase Y so the following mtime and saved-turn gates can prove same-run writeback

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_after_mixed_perf_save
steps.abort_reason: saved-player file mtime did not advance after confirming the mixed hostile performance save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime advanced after the confirmed mixed hostile performance save

steps.label: audit_saved_game_turn_after_mixed_perf_windows
steps.abort_reason: saved-player turn counter did not advance by at least the sampled 500-turn window after mixed hostile measurement and save/writeback
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player turn metadata proves live game time advanced through at least the 500 sampled turns before save/writeback

evidence_contract.claim: one active bandit site, one active cannibal site, one writhing stalker, and one nearby overmap horde can coexist through a 500-turn sample plus a 30-minute live hostile-overmap cadence window while emitting compact performance/readability metrics
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for performance
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No mixed hostile performance credit if startup/load, all four saved setup ingredients, sampled 500-turn timing, stalker live instrumentation, bounded 30-minute wait/cadence artifact lines, save/writeback, and saved turn delta are not classified separately. Horde direct timing may be reported as not instrumented if present but not separately timed.
